ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the software project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "lead_developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead developer for the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client or customer for the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository hosting the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_developer_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the module belongs to */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "module_status" TEXT /* Current status of the module (e.g., in development, testing, released) */,
  "lead_developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead developer for the module */,
  "module_type" TEXT /* Type of the module (e.g., core, utility, feature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_lead_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_developer_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module the package belongs to */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "package_status" TEXT /* Current status of the package (e.g., in development, testing, released) */,
  "lead_developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead developer for the package */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of the package (e.g., core, utility, feature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_lead_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_developer_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package the class belongs to */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "class_status" TEXT /* Current status of the class (e.g., in development, testing, released) */,
  "lead_developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead developer for the class */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Type of the class (e.g., core, utility, feature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_lead_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_developer_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_coverage" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code coverage record */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the coverage record belongs to */,
  "instruction_missed" INTEGER /* Number of instructions missed */,
  "instruction_covered" INTEGER /* Number of instructions covered */,
  "branch_missed" INTEGER /* Number of branches missed */,
  "branch_covered" INTEGER /* Number of branches covered */,
  "line_missed" INTEGER /* Number of lines missed */,
  "line_covered" INTEGER /* Number of lines covered */,
  "complexity_missed" INTEGER /* Number of complexity points missed */,
  "complexity_covered" INTEGER /* Number of complexity points covered */,
  "method_missed" INTEGER /* Number of methods missed */,
  "method_covered" INTEGER /* Number of methods covered */,
  "branch_coverage" REAL /* Branch coverage percentage */,
  "statement_coverage" REAL /* Statement coverage percentage */,
  "complexity" INTEGER /* Complexity score */,
  "mutation_score" REAL /* Mutation score percentage */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build the coverage record belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coverage metrics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_coverage_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_coverage_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Unique hash for the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message describing the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date when the commit was made */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the commit */,
  "commit_type" TEXT /* Type of the commit (e.g., bug fix, feature, refactor) */,
  "commit_size" INTEGER /* Size of the commit (number of lines changed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., developer, tester, manager) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the author belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the author joined the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "builds" (
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build */,
  "build_number" INTEGER /* Build number */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the build */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the build */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the build (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit that triggered the build */,
  "build_type" TEXT /* Type of the build (e.g., development, release, hotfix) */,
  "build_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the build */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repository_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "repository_type" TEXT /* Type of the repository (e.g., Git, SVN, Mercurial) */,
  "repository_size" INTEGER /* Size of the repository in bytes */,
  "last_commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last commit in the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the commit belongs to */,
  "commit_type" TEXT /* Type of the commit (e.g., bug fix, feature, refactor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id", "repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_builds" (
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the build is performed on */,
  "build_type" TEXT /* Type of the build (e.g., development, release, hotfix) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_id", "repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
